prepared replay 部署回放链路测试

paginationRiskRemediations.pagination-risk-long-section: Split the deployment walkthrough into prerequisites, environment setup, service configuration, startup order, verification, and rollback subsections before building, or raise paginationRiskThresholds.longSectionChars if long runbook-style deployment sections are expected.
paginationRiskRemediations.pagination-risk-dense-section-block: Separate commands, configuration snippets, log observations, and operational explanation into distinct paragraphs or lists so Word/WPS can paginate the deployment process safely.
paginationRiskRemediations.pagination-risk-figure-cluster: Spread deployment screenshots across '部署步骤与配置', '验证结果', and '问题处理与回滚预案', or group them by service/component before layout if a release run normally needs many evidence screenshots.
